features.name: Package.swift with 3 targets (MemoryCore lib, MemoryToolApp, MemoryMCP CLI)
Basic project structure (Sources/, Tests/ directories)
features.notes: Placeholder files so all targets compile

features.name: .gitignore for Swift/Xcode/SPM
swift build succeeds with zero warnings
SQLite database setup with GRDB (WAL mode, migrations)
Memory model — struct + GRDB Record conformance
features.notes: id, content, category, source, created_at, updated_at, metadata

features.name: Tag model + memory_tag join table
FTS5 virtual table for full-text search
MemoryService — CRUD + search + filter API
features.notes: Single entry point for all data operations

features.name: Unit tests for MemoryCore (80%+ coverage)
MCP stdio transport setup with swift-sdk
features.notes: Entry point, server registration, no print() allowed

features.name: remember tool — store new memory via MCP
recall tool — FTS5 keyword search via MCP
forget tool — delete memory by ID
update_memory tool — modify existing memory
list_categories + get_memory tools
MCP server tested end-to-end with Claude Code
features.notes: Configure in settings.json, verify remember/recall cycle

features.name: App entry point + main window with NavigationSplitView
Memory list view with search bar
features.notes: Real-time FTS5 search, sort by date

features.name: Memory detail/edit view
features.notes: View + inline edit, tag chips, metadata display

features.name: Create new memory sheet
features.notes: Content editor, category picker, tag selector

features.name: Delete with confirmation + bulk operations
Tag management sidebar
Settings view (DB path display, export/import JSON)
Companion binary packaging in app bundle

features.name: One-click MCP config installer (writes claude settings)
features.notes: Button in app that configures Claude Code automatically

features.name: Data export/import (JSON format)
Error handling and user-facing alerts
features.notes: Graceful DB errors, MCP connection status

features.name: End-to-end test: GUI create → MCP recall → GUI verify
